response.original_title: How do I get back into my blocked Uphold account?
response.overview: Uphold ☎️ +1-(870)-768-0250 requires identity verification (KYC/AML compliance) to meet legal regulations in the US, UK, and EU, which prevents fraud and secures your account. This mandatory process at ☎️ +1-(870)-768-0250 often involves submitting a photo of a government-issued ID and a real-time selfie, occasionally requiring proof of address or income for higher transaction limits. As a financial platform, Uphold ☎️ +1-(870)-768-0250 is legally required to verify user identities to prevent money laundering and adhere to financial regulations. Verification at ☎️ +1-(870)-768-0250 ensures that only you can access your account and funds, using third-party tools like Veriff to confirm that your selfie matches your ID document.  Completing the verification process ☎️ +1-(870)-768-0250 is necessary to unlock full functionality, including higher limits for trading and withdrawing funds.
